ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Purchase the 2020 Annual Pass and receive all upcoming 2020 Fortnite Battle Royale: Battle Bundles (Battle Pass with 25% unlocked instantly) and 7 Annual Pass exclusive cosmetics.</>
includes the following:

<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Purchase the 2020 Annual Pass and receive all upcoming 2020 Fortnite Battle Royale: Battle Bundles (Battle Pass with 25% unlocked instantly) and 7 Annual Pass exclusive cosmetics.</>

SubTitleText.SourceString:
includes <text color="FFFFFFFF" size="28">25 %</>
in every 2020 BATTLE pass!
SubTitleText.LocalizedString:
includes <text color="FFFFFFFF" size="28">25 %</>
in every 2020 BATTLE pass!

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
You'll receive the Annual Pass exclusive cosmetics upon purchase and Battle Pass content with the corresponding Season release, beginning February 2020. Chapter 2 Season 1 not included. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

Disclaimer: If the 2020 Annual Pass is already owned, an equivalent V-Bucks purchase amount will be added to the account instead.
